title: Diversified Income Model for Solo Companies
excerpt: Monetizing through AdSense, CPS affiliates, SaaS, and more
content:
With 1,000 daily UV, AdSense earns approximately $10 to $50 per month. CPS affiliate commissions range from 5% to 15%. Paid tools can use a free + Pro model. Knowledge monetization is another avenue. In the early stages, focus on AdSense + CPS, then develop paid products once stable. Don't rely on a single income source, but in the beginning, don't spread yourself too thin either.

## Why This Topic Matters

With 1,000 daily UV, AdSense earns approximately $10 to $50 per month. CPS affiliate commissions range from 5% to 15%. Paid tools can use a free + Pro model. Knowledge monetization is another avenue. In the early stages, focus on AdSense + CPS, then develop paid products once stable. Don't rely on a single income source, but in the beginning, don't spread yourself too thin either.
